title: marshallia spiralis
intro: Marshallia spiralis, also known as the spiral marigold, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Marshallia spiralis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Marshallia spiralis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
